crossRefs.label: If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode. Verify that HDS communicates with the vehicle and the PGM-FI ECU. If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

refs.label: If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

items: Inspection of stall rotation should be kept to a minimum to confirm the cause when diagnosing a malfunction.
This inspection should not be performed continuously for more than 10 seconds.
Do not operate the select lever with the engine running at high rpm.
Do not check stall rotation with the oil pressure gauge attached. (There is a risk of exceeding the pressure resistance limit of the oil pressure gauge.)

items.text: The stall rpm in each position must be equal and within the specified range.
The stall rpm in each position must be equal and within the specified range.
Read the engine speed 6-8 seconds after the accelerator pedal is depressed. The engine speed is high for 5 seconds after the accelerator pedal is depressed.
Read the engine speed 6-8 seconds after the accelerator pedal is depressed. The engine speed is high for 5 seconds after the accelerator pedal is depressed.

rows.text: Stall RPMs in D, L or S, and R positions are all high
Defective oil pump Clogged oil strainer Defective PH regulator valve Defective clutch reducing valve Defective clutch pressure control SOL.V. Defective backup valve Manual Valve failure
High stall rpm in R position
Low stall rpm in D, L or S, R position

Insufficient engine power Defective PH regulator valve Defective drive pulley control SOL.V. Driven Puli Control SOL.V. Defective Defective DR control valve Defective DN control valve Torque converter One-way clutch slippage Defective clutch reducing valve Defective oil pump
